name: ambulance_dispatch
description: an ambulance dispatch world: incidents by priority and units; actions dispatch, arrive, return

card.description: an ambulance dispatch world: incidents by priority and units; actions dispatch, arrive, return

rules: An incident has a priority (1 = most urgent) and a status: waiting -> assigned -> onscene -> resolved.
A unit has a status forming the lifecycle: idle -> enroute -> onscene -> idle.
'dispatch' sends an idle unit to a waiting incident: the unit becomes enroute and the incident assigned. If params are omitted, the first idle unit is sent to the most urgent waiting incident.
'arrive' marks an enroute unit onscene; its incident also becomes onscene.
'return' clears an onscene unit back to idle, resolves its incident, and increments 'resolved'.
Every successful action advances 'time' by one tick; illegal actions are no-ops.
A unit serves at most one incident at a time, and an incident is held by at most one unit.

emit.report: Dispatch board @ t={time}: {available} unit(s) available, {resolved} incident(s) resolved.
